case_title: FREDDIE CARE JR. VS. AURORA DAYRIT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1377-14TH AVENUE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70367053)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70367053) AS TO DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA
DECLARATION OF DAVID P WASSERMAN RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70367053) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70367053), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE SERVED JUN-19-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE- UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 70367053) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70367053), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE SERVED JUN-16-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT DAYRIT, AURORA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 70184947) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE JR., FREDDIE
